response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, open-source contributions, and exposure to agentic workflows at re:cinq, but lacks demonstrable leadership in scaling AI systems in regulated fintech environments, has no clear track record managing teams beyond 10 people, and shows no evidence of building real-time credit-risk or working-capital systems required for the role.
strengths: Exposure to agentic AI infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq
Proven experience with event-driven systems and real-time data pipelines (Dlang, microservices)
Strong open-source contributions and technical communication skills
concerns: No evidence of leading engineering teams beyond 10 people or developing senior technical leadership layers
Lacks demonstrated production experience in fintech infrastructure, credit risk, or regulatory compliance systems
No clear track record in model-agnostic AI architecture, feedback loops, or observability for financial AI agents
